article_new.title: Rightmove Sued for £1.5 Billion by UK Estate Agent Coalition
article_new.lead: A coalition of UK estate agencies has filed a £1.5 billion class-action lawsuit against Rightmove, alleging the portal abused its market-dominant position to impose excessive subscription fees. The claimants, represented by competition law specialist Hausfeld, number approximately 4,000 agencies and argue Rightmove's pricing has increased 50% over five years with no commensurate improvement in lead quality. Rightmove currently commands over 80% market share of UK property searches.

corpus.title: Agent Pens Open Letter to Rightmove After 12% Price Hike
corpus.lead: A UK estate agent operating 15 branches published an open letter condemning Rightmove's decision to raise subscription fees by 12% in January 2026. The letter, circulated among 2,000 agents, argues Rightmove's dominance allows it to extract fees with no competitive constraint.

corpus.title: Rightmove FY2025: Strong Results and Accelerated Innovation as Profits Hit Double Digit Growth
corpus.lead: Rightmove reported full-year 2025 revenue of £366 million, up 11%, with operating profit margins of 71% — the highest in its 25-year history. CEO cited accelerated AI product investment despite rising agent dissatisfaction with subscription pricing.

corpus.title: Czech Regulator Forces Sreality Subscription Price Cut After Abuse of Dominance Ruling
corpus.lead: The Czech Office for the Protection of Competition ruled that Sreality, dominant Czech property portal, must reduce agency subscription fees by 35%. The case is the first in the EU of a portal compelled to reduce pricing through competition law.

corpus.title: $2B legal action against Rightmove gains new participant
corpus.lead: The £1.5B class action against Rightmove has gained a significant new claimant, increasing pressure on the UK portal. Agents accuse Rightmove of monopolistic pricing practices.

corpus.title: Product and Services Roundup: ChatGPT Additions for Rightmove, Idealista and HepsiEmlak
corpus.lead: Rightmove added a ChatGPT-powered search assistant alongside Idealista and HepsiEmlak. Rightmove says early data shows a 12% increase in time-on-site for users engaging with the chatbot.

corpus.title: Rightmove introduces new three-tier subscription model for estate agencies
corpus.lead: Rightmove unveiled a redesigned subscription structure replacing the single monthly fee with three tiers. The Enterprise tier at £2,400/month includes priority placement, AI market appraisal, and enhanced analytics. Rightmove says the change aims to 'align pricing with value delivered'.

corpus.title: Zillow launches Zillow Preview to bring pre-market home listings into the open
corpus.lead: Zillow introduced Zillow Preview, a new listing category allowing sellers to test market interest before officially listing. Properties in Preview are visible to shoppers but excluded from third-party syndication.

corpus.title: Homes.com reaches 30M monthly visitors as US portal traffic sees biggest shift in a decade
corpus.lead: Homes.com surpassed 30 million monthly unique visitors in March 2026. Zillow remains market leader with 220M monthly visits; Realtor.com declined to 68M from 88M a year prior.

corpus.title: Scout24 acquires Spanish online real estate platforms Fotocasa and Habitaclia
corpus.lead: Scout24 agreed to acquire Fotocasa and Habitaclia from Adevinta for €620 million, expanding from Germany into Spain's number-two and number-three portals by traffic.

corpus.title: D.E. Shaw Joins Shareholder Revolt as Pressure Mounts on CoStar Board
corpus.lead: Hedge fund D.E. Shaw joined activist shareholders pressuring CoStar's board over massive Homes.com spending and profitability timeline. Board governance battle escalating.

article_new.title: CoStar eliminates Domain's Australian strategy, product and tech teams
article_new.lead: CoStar Group has dissolved the strategy, product, and technology divisions at Domain, the Australian real estate portal. The functions will be absorbed into CoStar's global US team. Approximately 120 staff in Sydney and Melbourne are affected.

corpus.title: CoStar EBITDA Surges 83% as Domain to Fold Into Homes.com
corpus.lead: CoStar Q4 2025 earnings: EBITDA surged 83%. Key announcement — Domain will be fully folded into Homes.com platform rather than run as a separate product. Confirms CoStar's US-centric consolidation strategy.

corpus.title: Australia's Domain to Sell Adjacent Businesses as CoStar Vision Takes Shape
corpus.lead: Domain announced plans to divest adjacent businesses to focus on core property portal, as CoStar's post-acquisition vision comes into focus. Domain to become a leaner portal business.

corpus.title: CoStar Group Launches Transformative AI Experience on Homes.com
corpus.lead: CoStar launched major AI search experience on Homes.com with conversational search and AI-powered recommendations. CEO Florance: 'the end of filter-based search as the primary discovery mechanism'.

corpus.title: D.E. Shaw Joins Shareholder Revolt as Pressure Mounts on CoStar Board
corpus.lead: D.E. Shaw joined activist shareholders pressuring CoStar's board over Homes.com spending. Growing investor impatience with profitability timeline.

corpus.title: CoStar Group Appoints Nana Banerjee to Board of Directors
corpus.lead: CoStar appointed Nana Banerjee (former SecureWorks CEO) to its board, citing expertise in data governance and cloud-scale operations. First board appointment in 18 months.

corpus.title: Homes.com Expands Pre-Market Listings Program Nationwide
corpus.lead: Homes.com extended its pre-market listing feature to all 50 US states after a six-month pilot. Buyers can receive inquiries up to 30 days before official listing date.

corpus.title: Scout24 acquires Spanish online real estate platforms Fotocasa and Habitaclia
corpus.lead: Scout24 agreed to acquire Fotocasa and Habitaclia from Adevinta for €620 million, expanding from Germany into Spain.

corpus.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
corpus.lead: Zillow launched an AI conversational search assistant. Users can describe preferences in natural language for personalized home recommendations.

corpus.title: Opendoor acquires Doma's closing, escrow and title technology stack
corpus.lead: Opendoor acquired Doma's AI-powered title insurance and escrow automation for ~$150M. Will integrate into Sell+Close product and open to third-party agents.

corpus.title: Rightmove Sued for £1.5 Billion by UK Estate Agent Coalition
corpus.lead: 4,000 UK agencies filed a £1.5B class action against Rightmove, alleging abuse of dominant market position. Rightmove commands 80%+ of UK property searches.

article_new.title: Zillow Preview gains rapid momentum as dozens of new brokerages sign on
article_new.lead: Zillow announced that more than 60 brokerage firms have joined its Zillow Preview program since the March launch. Preview listings have generated 2.3x more saves per view than standard listings in participating markets.

corpus.title: Zillow launches Zillow Preview to bring pre-market home listings into the open
corpus.lead: Zillow introduced Zillow Preview allowing sellers to list before officially hitting the market. Properties visible to shoppers but excluded from third-party syndication. Participating brokerages can opt-in starting April 1.

corpus.title: Compass partners with Rocket-Redfin to display coming-soon listings
corpus.lead: Compass struck a deal with the Rocket-Redfin platform to show Compass Private Exclusive coming-soon listings. Significant portal alliance reshaping the pre-market listings landscape.

corpus.title: Judge Denies Compass Bid to Block Zillow Listings Ban
corpus.lead: Court denied Compass's attempt to block Zillow's policy banning listings that bypass MLS. Significant legal victory for Zillow's 'listings integrity' strategy. Compass's Private Exclusive program faces legal headwinds.

corpus.title: Homes.com Expands Pre-Market Listings Program Nationwide
corpus.lead: Homes.com extended its pre-market listing feature to all 50 US states after a six-month pilot. Buyers can see listings up to 30 days before official listing date.

corpus.title: Compass touts record revenue as private listing strategy drives growth
corpus.lead: Compass reported record Q1 2026 revenue, citing its exclusive private listing network as the primary growth driver. Private listings now account for 12% of total transaction volume.

corpus.title: NWMLS files federal lawsuit against Compass over pocket listing practices
corpus.lead: Northwest MLS filed a federal lawsuit against Compass over its Private Exclusive pocket listing program, alleging violations of MLS cooperation rules.

corpus.title: Redfin to Show Compass Private Listings in Portal Plot Twist
corpus.lead: Redfin agreed to display Compass Private Exclusive listings on its portal. Signals fractures in the anti-pocket-listing coalition.

corpus.title: Zillow Goes AI Mode With New Home Search Assistant
corpus.lead: Zillow launched an AI conversational search assistant. Users can describe preferences in natural language.

corpus.title: CoStar EBITDA Surges 83% as Domain to Fold Into Homes.com
corpus.lead: CoStar Q4 EBITDA surged 83%. Domain will be folded into Homes.com. Confirms CoStar's US-centric strategy.

corpus.title: New data shows AI search adoption by homebuyers climbing fast
corpus.lead: 38% of US homebuyers used an AI-assisted search tool in their most recent purchase, up from 11% in 2024. Among buyers under 35, adoption reached 61%.
